tasks.title: Update hex-agent/src/workplan_executor.rs to implement try_with_escalation() that: (1) tries local model, (2) validates output, (3) on validation failure tries OpenRouter if OPENROUTER_API_KEY set, (4) on failure tries Claude if ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set, (5) returns best result with metrics on which tier succeeded
Add InferenceAttempt struct to track: tier_used (Local/OpenRouter/Claude), model_name, validation_passed, duration_ms, cost_estimate so we can log which tier actually worked

phases.title: Add escalation logic to workplan executor

tasks.title: Add OpenRouterClient::generate() to hex-agent/src/inference_client.rs that calls api.openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions with model deepseek/deepseek-coder for T2 tasks
Add ClaudeClient::generate() to hex-agent/src/inference_client.rs that calls api.anthropic.com/v1/messages with claude-sonnet-4 as final fallback tier

title: Implement automatic escalation: Local → OpenRouter → Claude on validation failure
